property.name: fieldSetName
property.label: Field Set Name
property.description: API name of the FieldSet on QuoteLineItem

property.name: configuratorFlowApiName
property.label: Configurator Flow API Name (deprecated)
property.description: No longer used. Bundle configuration is now built-in.

property.name: defaultPageSize
property.label: Products Per Page
property.description: Number of products per page in the browser
